title: Pet Munchies Beef Liver Crunch Dog Treats, Premium Grain Free Dog Chews with Natural Real Meat 90g
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL BEEF LIVER: This gourmet crunchy treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade beef liver - delicately hand baked to perfection

A GREAT SOURCE OF PROTEIN & NUTRIENTS: Our crunchy treats are a single source protein, proving a healthy source of vitamins, good fatty acids and many other minerals and nutrients which helps towards maintaining good health for your dogs
HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE: These beef liver snacks are low in salt and high in protein and they contain no grain or gluten or any artificial colours or flavouring

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our beef liver crunch treats are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 9 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
